steps.title: Before lysing cells and purifying DNA,...
steps.instruction: Before lysing cells and purifying DNA, prepare the Column Wash Solution by adding ethanol. Cap tightly after addition. See Technical Bulletin #TB374 for detailed instructions.

steps.title: Prepare Lysate
steps.instruction: Prepare Lysate

steps.title: Add 600µl of bacterial culture to a 1
steps.instruction: Add 600µl of bacterial culture to a 1.5ml microcentrifuge tube. Note: For higher yields and purity use the alternative protocol below to harvest and process up to 3ml of bacterial culture.

steps.title: Add 100µl of Cell Lysis Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 100µl of Cell Lysis Buffer (Blue), and mix by inverting the tube 6 times.

steps.title: Add 350µl of cold (4–8°C) Neutralization...
steps.instruction: Add 350µl of cold (4–8°C) Neutralization Solution, and mix thoroughly by inverting.

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge for 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant (~900µl) to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant (~900µl) to a PureYield™ Minicolumn without disturbing the cell debris pellet.

steps.title: Place the minicolumn into a Collection...
steps.instruction: Place the minicolumn into a Collection Tube, and centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Discard the flowthrough, and place the...
steps.instruction: Discard the flowthrough, and place the minicolumn into the same Collection Tube.

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash

steps.title: Add 200µl of Endotoxin Removal Wash (ERB) to the minicolumn
steps.instruction: Add 200µl of Endotoxin Removal Wash (ERB) to the minicolumn. Centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Add 400µl of Column Wash Solution (CWC) to the minicolumn
steps.instruction: Add 400µl of Column Wash Solution (CWC) to the minicolumn. Centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Elute
steps.instruction: Elute

steps.title: Transfer the minicolumn to a clean 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the minicolumn to a clean 1.5ml microcentrifuge tube, then add 30µl of Elution Buffer or nuclease-free water directly to the minicolumn matrix. Let stand for 1 minute at room temperature.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 seconds to elute the plasmid DNA
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 seconds to elute the plasmid DNA. Cap the microcentrifuge tube, and store eluted plasmid DNA at –20°C.

steps.title: Centrifuge 1
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 1.5ml of bacterial culture for 30 seconds at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge. Discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add an additional 1
steps.instruction: Add an additional 1.5ml of bacterial culture to the same tube and repeat Step 1.

steps.title: Add 600µl of TE Buffer or...
steps.instruction: Add 600µl of TE Buffer or water to the cell pellet, and resuspend completely.

steps.title: Proceed to Step 2 of the standard protocol above
steps.instruction: Proceed to Step 2 of the standard protocol above.

steps.title: Prepare Lysate
steps.instruction: Prepare Lysate

steps.title: Transfer 1
steps.instruction: Transfer 1.5ml of culture to a 1.5ml microcentrifuge tube. Note: If you wish to process larger volumes of bacterial culture (up to 3ml) use the alternative protocol provided below.

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge for 1 minute.

steps.title: Remove and discard medium
steps.instruction: Remove and discard medium.

steps.title: Resuspend the cell pellet in 600µl...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cell pellet in 600µl of TE buffer or water.

steps.title: Add 100µl of Cell Lysis Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 100µl of Cell Lysis Buffer (Blue), and mix by inverting the tube 6 times.

steps.title: Add 350µl of cold (4–8°C) Neutralization...
steps.instruction: Add 350µl of cold (4–8°C) Neutralization Solution, and mix thoroughly by inverting.

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge for 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge for 3 minutes. Place a PureYield™ minicolumn on a Luer-Lok® adapter of a VacMan® or VacMan® Jr Laboratory Vacuum manifold.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant (~900µl) into a PureYield™ Minicolumn
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant (~900µl) into a PureYield™ Minicolumn.

steps.title: Apply vacuum pulling the lysate through the column
steps.instruction: Apply vacuum pulling the lysate through the column.

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash

steps.title: Add 200µl of Endotoxin Removal Wash (ERB) to the minicolumn
steps.instruction: Add 200µl of Endotoxin Removal Wash (ERB) to the minicolumn. Allow the vacuum to pull the solution through the column.

steps.title: Add 400µl of Column Wash Solution (CWC) to the minicolumn
steps.instruction: Add 400µl of Column Wash Solution (CWC) to the minicolumn. Allow the vacuum to pull the solution through the column. Release the vacuum, and remove the PureYield™ Minicolumn.

steps.title: Elute
steps.instruction: Elute

steps.title: Place the column in a 2ml...
steps.instruction: Place the column in a 2ml collection tube, and centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge for 1 minute.

steps.title: Transfer the minicolumn into a clean 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the minicolumn into a clean 1.5ml microcentrifuge tube, then add 30µl of Elution Buffer or nuclease-free water directly to the minicolumn matrix. Let stand for 1 minute at room temperature.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 seconds to elute the plasmid DNA
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 seconds to elute the plasmid DNA. Cap the microcentrifuge tube, and store eluted plasmid DNA at –20°C.

steps.title: Centrifuge 1
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 1.5ml of bacterial culture for 30 seconds at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge.

steps.title: Discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add an additional 1
steps.instruction: Add an additional 1.5ml of bacterial culture to the same tube. Repeat Steps 1 and 2.

steps.title: Add 600µl of TE buffer or...
steps.instruction: Add 600µl of TE buffer or water to the cell pellet, and resuspend completely.

steps.title: Proceed to Step 5 of the standard protocol above
steps.instruction: Proceed to Step 5 of the standard protocol above.
